fallback_reason: IRIS Agriculture row (p50=$2M,p95=$3M) is a near-point-mass artifact (sigma~0.247, p95/p50=1.5x vs 10-200x for real sectors) AND wrong NAICS family; food processing is NAICS 311-312 (within manufacturing). Epic C-disqualified.
